title: selaginella furcillifolia
intro: Selaginella furcillifolia, also known as the forked spike moss, is a species of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella furcillifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even treat certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Selaginella furcillifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
